para_trans: Appointment by direct service, promotion and deputation
Appointment authority declared
In regards to doing
Government of Maharashtra
Department of Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection
Government Decision No.6826 / No.130 / No.15
Madam Cama Marg, Martyr Rajguru Chowk,
Mantralaya, Mumbai - 400032
Dated July 9, 2026
Read: - Government Decisions, General Administration Department No. SRV-2016 / Q. No.290 / Works-12,
The Proposal: -
Appointment in respect of Government servants by direct service, promotion or deputation /
The level to which the relevant cases should be presented at the time of posting and the level at which the final decision should be taken.
There are no specific orders to be taken. Usually with the approval of the appointing authority.
The process of appointing government employees is carried out. But who is the appointing authority?
The government was considering removing the ambiguity about whether there would be.
The Government's Decisions:
Group-A, Group-B under the administrative division of Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection
(Gazetted) / (Non-Gazetted), in direct service of Group C and Group D employees, by promotion or
The level at which final decisions are to be taken by the deputation in the matter of appointment / posting.
For this purpose, the General Administration Department, Govt. Under the direction of the Government Decision of 19.11.2016, the following
Appointment authorities are being set up.
table_trans: Office of the Controller, Ration Allocation and Director, Civil Supplies, Mumbai
Ration Allocation Officer / Chief Inspection Officer

para_trans: Government Decision No.: STAP-6826 / P.No.130 / N.P.15
2. Controller, Ration Distribution under Food, Civil Supplies and Consumer Protection Department and
Director Civil Supplies, Mumbai and mentioned in column 2 of the above paragraph in the Divisional Supply System.
The officers mentioned in column 3 for the posts should be made in direct service, promotion or deputation.
To be declared as appointing authority to take final decision on matters of appointment / posting.
It's coming.

para_trans: Government Decision No.: STAP-6826 / P.No.130 / N.P.15
3. Appointments to be made by the aforesaid appointing authority by direct service, promotion or deputation /
There shall be competent authorities to take final decisions on matters of appointment. However, with regard to the change
The final decision will be taken by the competent authority declared under the Transfer Act.
The Government decision is available on the Government of Maharashtra website www.maharashtra.gov.in.
